repos.name: neckarshore-easter-eggs
repos.description: Session artifacts from an AI-orchestration team — songs, films, posters, quotes. Auto-synced from session Easter Eggs.

repos.name: clearpath-52
repos.description: ClearPath — a mental firewall against cognitive bias: describe a decision and get a structured second opinion before you commit.

repos.name: mmp-local-seo-performance-hub
repos.description: A visibility platform for local businesses: rankings, reviews, and citations in one Visibility Score (0–100). Built for small businesses and the agencies that manage them.

repos.name: mmp-prod-or-pretend
repos.description: A constructive quality mirror for tech hype — checks 'built it in a weekend' claims against real production standards (tests, security, scalability, docs). Not a debunker; it helps decision-makers tell substance from air.

repos.name: ai-phrase-check
repos.description: Spot AI-typical phrasing in German and English writing so your text reads human. Includes a quick web demo.

repos.name: imap-mailbox-cleanup
repos.description: Safely tidy an overflowing email mailbox — preview every change first, keep an audit trail, and nothing is deleted for good.

repos.name: obsidian-vault-autopilot
repos.description: Keeps an Obsidian vault tidy on its own — sorts, renames, tags, and enriches your notes automatically.

repos.name: goldoni-website
repos.description: Ristorante Goldoni, Stuttgart — website for the family-run Italian restaurant: menu, wine list, recommendations, and reservations.

repos.name: neckarshore-website
repos.description: Web presence and landing page for Neckarshore AI — AI products built in Germany, privacy-first and enterprise-grade.

repos.name: oakwoodgolfclub-website
repos.description: Oakwood Golf Club — fully digital remote membership for golfers: keep an official handicap and stay tournament-eligible without a home club.

repos.name: rauhut-website
repos.description: Personal site of German Rauhut — Technical Product Owner and AI product builder.
